text.ar: المتدرب جاهز للعمل ويتأكد أن المحطة والمنطقة المحيطة بها نظيفة وآمنة
text.en: The trainee is ready for work and ensures the station and surrounding area are clean and safe

reasons.ar: لم يقم بفحص المنطقة قبل البدء
reasons.en: Did not inspect the area before starting
Presence of waste on the floor

reasons.ar: لم يتم التأكد من جاهزية المعدات
reasons.en: Did not ensure equipment readiness
There is a risk of slipping or encountering obstacles
The station was not arranged correctly

text.ar: يعرف الفرق بين نظيف ومعقم ويستطيع شرحه بشكل صحيح
text.en: Knows the difference between clean and sanitized and can explain it correctly

reasons.en: Does not know the definition of clean
Does not know the definition of sanitized
Confuses the two concepts

reasons.ar: لا يستطيع شرح الفرق بشكل صحيح
reasons.en: Cannot explain the difference correctly
Has not been trained sufficiently

text.ar: يلتزم بمسح الأسطح باستخدام فوط معقمة بشكل متكرر خلال الوردية
text.en: Frequently wipes surfaces using sanitized cloths throughout the shift

reasons.en: Does not use sanitized cloths
Does not replace cloths regularly
Uses a dirty cloth
Does not wipe surfaces frequently

reasons.ar: لا يغمر الفوطة في محلول التعقيم
reasons.en: Does not soak the cloth in sanitizing solution

text.ar: يحضر محلول التعقيم بالطريقة الصحيحة و يحافظ على فعاليته
text.en: Prepares the sanitizing solution correctly and maintains its effectiveness

reasons.en: Incorrect amount of water
Incorrect sanitizing solution ratio

reasons.ar: لم يتم تغيير المحلول عند اتساخه
reasons.en: Solution was not changed when it became dirty
Used expired solution
Does not know the preparation method

text.ar: يستخدم ألوان الفوط والمماسح بشكل صحيح حسب المنطقة
text.en: Uses cloth and mop colors correctly according to the area

reasons.en: Used the wrong mop color
Mixed red and blue cloths
Does not know the meaning of the colors
Used the same cloth for different areas

reasons.ar: تسبب في انتقال الدهون أو التلوث
reasons.en: Caused grease or contamination transfer

text.ar: يلتزم بخطوات تنظيف الأرضية الصحيحة (كنس – لوحات تحذير – مسح رقم 8 )
text.en: Follows the correct floor cleaning steps (sweeping - caution signs - figure 8 mopping)

reasons.en: Did not sweep the floor first
Did not use the figure 8 motion
Did not wring the mop properly
Pushed dirt under tables
Did not follow the correct sequence of steps

text.ar: يضع لوحات التحذير قبل المسح ولا يزيلها إلا بعد جفاف الأرضية
text.en: Places caution signs before mopping and does not remove them until the floor is dry

reasons.en: Caution signs were not placed
They were placed after mopping started
They were removed before the floor dried

reasons.ar: وضع اللوحات في مكان غير واضح
reasons.en: Placed the signs in an unclear location
Created a slip hazard

text.ar: يلتزم بتعقيم المعدات الصغيرة بالترتيب الصحيح
text.en: Sanitizes small equipment in the correct order

reasons.en: Incorrect sequence of steps
Did not use the correct sink
Sanitization was not done completely
Did not rinse before sanitizing
Did not leave the equipment to air dry

text.ar: يمنع انتقال التلوث من خلال الفصل بين الفوط النظيفة والمتسخة
text.en: Prevents cross-contamination by separating clean and dirty cloths

reasons.ar: وضع فوطة متسخة في دلو نظيف
reasons.en: Placed a dirty cloth in a clean bucket
Bucket was not covered
Mixed different cloths

reasons.ar: عدم استخدام دلو فيه صابون للفوط المتسخة
reasons.en: Did not use a soapy bucket for dirty cloths

reasons.ar: عدم تغيير محلول التعقيم عند اتساخه
reasons.en: Did not change the sanitizing solution when it became dirty

text.ar: يحافظ على بيئة آمنة وصحية من خلال منع نمو البكتيريا وانتقالها
text.en: Maintains a safe and hygienic environment by preventing bacterial growth and spread

reasons.en: Did not sanitize surfaces
Used unclean tools
Did not use gloves when required
Did not clean the area continuously
There are practices causing contamination

text.en: Verified to work independently at the station
